message.content:
Implement full internationalisation (English + German) in the Ludus frontend using `svelte-i18n`. The project is at `/home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend/`.

## Context

- Svelte 5 + Vite, no SvelteKit. `npm` must be run via Docker: `docker run --rm -v /home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend:/frontend -w /frontend node:22-alpine <cmd>`
- Already installed packages live in `node_modules/` inside the container volume. Add `svelte-i18n` with: `docker run --rm -v /home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend:/frontend -w /frontend node:22-alpine npm install svelte-i18n`
- Users are mostly German so German is the priority second language; English is the fallback.

## File structure to create

```
src/lib/i18n.js                          ← setup + auto-glob of game translations
src/lib/i18n/en.json                     ← global English strings
src/lib/i18n/de.json                     ← global German strings
src/games/tictactoe/i18n/en.json         ← TicTacToe English
src/games/tictactoe/i18n/de.json         ← TicTacToe German
src/games/connect_four/i18n/en.json      ← ConnectFour English
src/games/connect_four/i18n/de.json      ← ConnectFour German
```

## `src/lib/i18n.js`

```js
import { addMessages, init, getLocaleFromNavigator } from 'svelte-i18n';
import en from './i18n/en.json';
import de from './i18n/de.json';

addMessages('en', en);
addMessages('de', de);

// Auto-import all game translation files (e.g. src/games/*/i18n/*.json)
const gameMsgs = import.meta.glob('../games/*/i18n/*.json', { eager: true });
for (const [path, mod] of Object.entries(gameMsgs)) {
  const loc = path.match(/\/([a-z_]+)\.json$/)[1];
  addMessages(loc, mod.default);
}

export function setupI18n() {
  init({
    fallbackLocale: 'en',
    initialLocale: localStorage.getItem('ludus_locale') || getLocaleFromNavigator(),
  });
}
```

## Translation key structure

Use these namespaced keys across **all** components. The JSON files must match exactly.

### `src/lib/i18n/en.json`
```json
{
  "nav": {
    "my_token": "My Token"
  },
  "token_import": {
    "prompt": "Import token {token}? This replaces your current device identity.",
    "confirm": "Import",
    "cancel": "Cancel"
  },
  "lobby": {
    "title": "My Games",
    "loading": "Loading…",
    "no_active": "No active games. Start one below!",
    "new_game": "+ New Game",
    "open_games": "Open Games",
    "finished_games": "Finished Games",
    "stats_in_progress": "{count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} in progress",
    "stats_total": "{count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} played all time",
    "create": {
      "title": "Start a new game",
      "username_label": "Your username",
      "username_placeholder": "Enter a username",
      "choose_game": "Choose game",
      "public_label": "Public game — anyone on this server can join",
      "submit": "Create & Get Invite Link",
      "submitting": "Creating…"
    }
  },
  "game_room": {
    "back": "← Back to lobby",
    "loading": "Loading…",
    "status_waiting": "waiting",
    "status_playing": "playing",
    "status_finished": "finished",
    "waiting_title": "Waiting for another player to join.",
    "invite_link": "Invite link",
    "copy": "Copy",
    "copied": "Copied!",
    "join_placeholder": "Your username",
    "join": "Join game",
    "joining": "Joining…",
    "you_win": "You win! 🎉",
    "winner_wins": "{winner} wins!",
    "draw": "It's a draw!",
    "go_to_rematch": "Go to Rematch →",
    "play_again": "Play Again",
    "starting_rematch": "Starting…",
    "your_turn": "Your turn!",
    "their_turn": "Waiting for {player}…",
    "push_on": "🔔 Notifying",
    "push_off": "🔕 Notify me",
    "push_on_title": "Notifications on — click to disable",
    "push_off_title": "Enable turn notifications",
    "no_ui": "No UI found for game \"{slug}\"."
  },
  "game_card": {
    "vs": "vs. {opponents}",
    "waiting_for_opponent": "waiting for opponent",
    "you": "(you)",
    "status_finished": "Finished",
    "status_waiting": "Waiting",
    "your_turn": "Your turn",
    "their_turn": "Their turn",
    "just_now": "just now",
    "hours_ago": "{n}h ago",
    "days_ago": "{n}d ago"
  },
  "token_manager": {
    "title": "Player Token",
    "description": "Your token identifies your games on this device. Export it to continue on another device — no account needed.",
    "your_token": "Your token",
    "copy": "Copy",
    "copied": "Copied!",
    "qr_hint": "Scan on another device to import automatically",
    "import_label": "Import a token from another device",
    "import_placeholder": "Paste token here",
    "import_btn": "Import",
    "warning": "This will replace your current token. Games on this device will no longer be visible unless you re-import the original token.",
    "confirm_import": "Yes, import",
    "cancel": "Cancel"
  }
}
```

```json
    "push_off": "🔕 Benachrichtigen",

  },

    "waiting_for_opponent": "Warte auf Gegner",

    "your_turn": "Du bist dran",

```

### `src/games/tictactoe/i18n/en.json`
```json
{
  "games": {
    "tictactoe": {
      "legend_label": "{name} = {mark}"
    }
  }
}
```

### `src/games/tictactoe/i18n/de.json`
```json
{
  "games": {
    "tictactoe": {
      "legend_label": "{name} = {mark}"
    }
  }
}
```

### `src/games/connect_four/i18n/en.json`
```json
{
  "games": {
    "connect_four": {
      "you_label": "(you)"
    }
  }
}
```

### `src/games/connect_four/i18n/de.json`
```json
{
  "games": {
    "connect_four": {
      "you_label": "(du)"
    }
  }
}
```

## Components to update

Replace ALL hardcoded strings with `$_('key', ...)` calls. Import `_` from svelte-i18n in each component's `<script>`:
```js
import { _ } from 'svelte-i18n';
```

### `src/App.svelte`
- Call `setupI18n()` at module level (import and call before reactive state)
- Import `locale` from svelte-i18n
- Add a language switcher to the header: two small buttons "EN" / "DE" that set `$locale` and persist to `localStorage.setItem('ludus_locale', lang)`
- Translate: `nav.my_token`, `token_import.prompt` (with `{token}` value = first 8 chars + "…"), `token_import.confirm`, `token_import.cancel`
- The "Ludus" brand name stays as-is (it's a proper noun)

### `src/pages/Lobby.svelte`
- Remove the `plural()` helper function entirely — use ICU keys instead
- Translate all strings using the `lobby.*` keys

### `src/pages/GameRoom.svelte`
- Translate all strings using `game_room.*` keys

### `src/components/GameCard.svelte`
- Translate using `game_card.*` keys
- For elapsed time: use `game_card.just_now`, `game_card.hours_ago` (with `{n}` value), `game_card.days_ago` (with `{n}` value)

### `src/components/TokenManager.svelte`
- Translate using `token_manager.*` keys

### `src/games/TicTacToe.svelte`
- The mark legend (e.g. "alice = X") — use `games.tictactoe.legend_label` with values `{name, mark}`

### `src/games/ConnectFour.svelte`
- The "(you)" label in the legend — use `games.connect_four.you_label`

## Important implementation notes

1. `setupI18n()` must be called **once** in `App.svelte` before any component renders. Call it at the top of `<script>` (module context), not inside a reactive block.
2. svelte-i18n's `$_` is a Svelte store — use it as `$_('key')` in templates and `$_('key')` in reactive `$derived()` (or just inline in template). In `<script>` blocks outside reactive contexts you can use the store directly.
3. The `locale` store from svelte-i18n can be set with `$locale = 'de'` in Svelte 5 runes mode — but since it's an external store (not `$state`), use `locale.set('de')` to be safe.
4. For the `getLocaleFromNavigator()` fallback, it returns e.g. `"de-DE"` — svelte-i18n's `init` with `fallbackLocale: 'en'` handles the region suffix gracefully.
5. Make sure the `import.meta.glob` pattern `'../games/*/i18n/*.json'` is relative to `src/lib/i18n.js` — verify paths are correct relative to that file.

After creating all files, run the Vite build inside Docker to verify no errors:
```
docker run --rm -v /home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend:/frontend -w /frontend node:22-alpine npm run build
```

Fix any build errors before finishing. Report what you did and whether the build succeeded.

content.text:
The build succeeded. The only output is a pre-existing accessibility warning about the `<div>` with a `mouseleave` handler in `ConnectFour.svelte` (not new, not an error - it was there before this change and doesn't block the build).

Here's a summary of what was done:

## Summary

**Installed:** `svelte-i18n` (36 packages added) via Docker.

**Created 7 new files:**
- `/home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js` — setup module with `addMessages`, `init`, `getLocaleFromNavigator`, and `import.meta.glob` auto-loader for game translation files
- `/home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend/src/lib/i18n/en.json` — global English strings
- `/home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend/src/lib/i18n/de.json` — global German strings
- `/home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend/src/games/tictactoe/i18n/en.json` + `de.json`
- `/home/oxi/dev/PycharmProjects/PyWebGames/ludus/frontend/src/games/connect_four/i18n/en.json` + `de.json`

**Updated 7 existing components:**
- `App.svelte` — calls `setupI18n()` at module level, adds EN/DE switcher buttons in the header (using `locale.set()` + `localStorage`), translates nav, token import banner strings
- `Lobby.svelte` — removed `plural()` helper, all strings use ICU keys (`lobby.*`) with plural support for stats
- `GameRoom.svelte` — all strings use `game_room.*` keys including status badges, turn indicator, rematch flow, push notification buttons
- `GameCard.svelte` — uses `game_card.*` keys; elapsed time uses `just_now`/`hours_ago`/`days_ago` with `{n}` interpolation
- `TokenManager.svelte` — uses `token_manager.*` keys throughout
- `TicTacToe.svelte` — legend uses `games.tictactoe.legend_label` with `{name, mark}` values
- `ConnectFour.svelte` — "(you)" label uses `games.connect_four.you_label`

**Build result:** Clean success — 176 modules transformed, no errors. The accessibility warning about the `mouseleave` div in ConnectFour is pre-existing and not an error.
